evals.name: cold-email-rapport
evals.prompt: Rewrite this cold email to build rapport without fake similarity or flattery.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: customer-interview-opener
evals.prompt: Design a customer interview opener that creates trust but does not bias answers.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
